title: Divide and conquer: how the new Keenadu backdoor exposed links between major And

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Divide and conquer: how the new Keenadu backdoor exposed lin
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/16
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*android.shopping*'
            - '*android.util*'
            - '*app-download.cn-wlcb.ufileos*'
            - '*com.action*'
            - '*com.aiworks.faceidservice*'
            - '*com.aiworks.lock.face.service*'
            - '*com.ak*'
            - '*com.ak.p.wp*'
            - '*com.arcsoft.closeli.service*'
            - '*com.einnovation.temu*'
            - '*com.extlib.apps*'
            - '*com.hs.client*'
            - '*com.hs.helper*'
            - '*com.pri.appcenter.service*'
            - '*com.taismart.global*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
